suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam DevNet 0 launch status and readiness
suggestions.rationale: DevNet was targeted for April 15 (with fallback April 22). ACDT #78 indicated end-of-week readiness for BAL DevNet 4/Glamsterdam DevNet 0 with execution-apis PR #770. No status update in last 2+ weeks; critical to confirm if launch occurred or identify blockers.

suggestions.topic: ePBS range sync security analysis outcome
suggestions.rationale: EL teams were assigned in ACDT #78 (April 20) to analyze security implications of CL syncing without payload envelopes. This is a fundamental architectural decision for ePBS that affects sync behavior and must be resolved before production.

suggestions.topic: epbs-devnet-1 status and path to devnet-2
suggestions.rationale: epbs-devnet-1 was reported broken since launch in ACDT #77 (April 13), with devnet-2 planned after beacon state changes. No updates provided in ACDT #78; needs resolution before ePBS can merge with BAL in Glamsterdam.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 gas accounting resolution across clients
suggestions.rationale: bal-devnet-3 forked on gas accounting disagreements (state gas reservoir overflow treatment) in April. Full EIP-8037 was included in bal-devnet-4, but client consensus on implementation details needs confirmation.

ACDT #76 targeted Prysm/Lighthouse trunk-ready by end of April with 300K validators. ACDT #78 showed only Prysm/Lighthouse deployed. Update needed on broader rollout to other CLs and partial cells (EIP-8136) production readiness.

Required by end-of-week April 20 for DevNet 4 launch, enabling EL reorg within canonical chain for ePBS (32-block limit debate). Critical for Glamsterdam DevNet 0; needs confirmation across EL clients.
Included in bal-devnet-4 as simple data EIPs (ACDT #77). Should receive brief status update on any issues discovered during devnet testing.
